0gt3h2146jc47ovx.note: #254 (Iron + Zinc) / Water -> add the two shares then diff(mode=ratio); 'how many times larger' = plain ratio (no percent).

0cy2ufyjsinsswpm.note: #256 GAP: cumulative running sum from the 20s age group until the cumulative share first exceeds 50% of the total; no cumulative-sum / first-crossing-threshold op in the grammar.

0ivzc37gi49isy9n.note: #257 highest 3-year total -> rollingWindow(window=3, sum) then findExtremum max. (Executes; rollingWindow may not render in the TS visualizer yet.)

0ijwrg723j4v8s3e.note: #259 Asia / sum(Northern-Hemisphere continents) as a percentage -> filter NH continents + sum, then diff(mode=ratio, percent). NH membership is an authoring judgment: included Asia/Africa/Europe/Nothern America (data spelling), excluded Latin America & Caribbean and Oceania (predominantly Southern Hemisphere).

0s6zi9dyw22qo4rp.note: diff of two period averages; between-slices are positional x ranges (note x also has an 'Average' bar; explanation scopes only the month ranges).

0qz3v0bszsex7jjm.note: below-average: average -> filter(<,ref). Explanation 'filter to ... below average'; no explicit count, left as filter.

0egdxqun1m2n9k4z.note: avg from 2006 to 2011 (filter between -> average). 'divide by six' = the averaging.

0gvrmm8qbn6o1vya.note: measure-value filter (<=60) on ticket price -> average.

0eq4w2wsl864mhcj.note: the only measure is 'Sales volume in million units'; Q's '60 or more' threshold and the averaged value are the same column. filter(>=60)->average.

0fh0emp095qhq3ag.note: largest-smallest within 2010-2019: filter then max, filter then min, then diff (mirrors 3-step explanation).

0i9bxppwocx0tyop.note: avg 2008-2011; explanation sum-then-average == average of filtered subset.

0iv07908ph6y6ifj.note: x_vals are not in chronological order (Dec'19, Mar'14, ...), so a positional 'between' slice would be wrong; used explicit include of the four March dates from Mar'16 to Mar'19.

0jbrb1dcbliiampz.note: count 2011-2014 with investment>22B: positional x slice -> value filter -> count.

0k7bm9iqewnrzj47.note: yes/no: avg(top3) > 2*avg(bottom3). top3/bottom3 via findExtremum rank1..3 (GOLD 0baf5ch9 pattern) + add + scale(1/3); double via scale(2); compareBool(>).

0abj8blv663ussbr.note: diff(2010,2020). retrieveValue targets are exact x labels.

0cad2xfrwdgvo9zk.note: n=11; 'three median values' = the 3 central ascending values (5th,6th,7th) summed. sort+nth(5,6,7)+add+add.

0a5npu4o61dz4r5f.note: diff(highest,lowest) damage; 3-step explanation -> max, min, diff (could also be range).

0v0l4wdbx7orkqz1.note: under-30 = age bands 15-19,20-24,25-29; over-70 = 70-74..90+. include-filter each band set -> sum -> compareBool(>). x labels use en-dash exactly as in x_vals.

0vqxnzu0mpbz12ch.note: compare two differences; 2023/2025 labels carry a trailing '*' in x_vals (2023*, 2025*). compareBool(>).

0vvz9mdgdiazke5o.note: Q asks the average 2012-2015; explanation says 'add all' but question is average -> used average (guide rule 1).

0xo3r87obscjsktm.note: GAP: final step divides the larger diff by the smaller diff (ratio of two differences). No divide/ratio-of-two-node-results op (scale needs a constant factor, not a ref). Not expressible.

0xnim79vztf8hjor.note: year with highest |value-average|: average -> diffByValue(|x-mean|) -> findExtremum max.

1a6pxfig1xf4oeu3.note: GAP: answer is a PERIOD (first & last year with franchise value <=200M), i.e. a [startX,endX] span of x labels, not a measure aggregate. No op returns a period span.

1bbe64wpvq06sknm.note: for each year, value minus overall average: average -> diffByValue(per-row minus mean, signed).

1bv05pu9d8jnidty.note: avg before 2026 == 2020-2025; 'sum then /6' == average of the six filtered.

1bywaj7stsb3060c.note: GAP: filter predicate is on a property of the x label string ('5 or fewer letters in name') — string-length test on category labels, not a measure filter or positional slice. Not expressible.

1fngt6cb1d60a2ow.note: GAP: requires compareBool of a single summed value against the constant 50000. compareBool needs two node refs (targetA/targetB both 'ref:nN'); there is no op producing the scalar 50000 to compare against (no literal-injection op). filter(exclude=['Metro Total'])+sum is expressible but the final constant comparison is not. (Also 'Metro Total' is likely a precomputed total bar, making the sum double-count.)

1e56qqj7moat9gqa.note: GAP: explanation 'find the same value for Spending and add the corresponding values' is underspecified/garbled (no clear selection criterion). Not deterministically mappable.

1esx2fbduhqn7knk.note: GAP: average after removing the single max row and single min row (trimmed mean). Dropping the argmax/argmin rows is not expressible (filter is by value/position thresholds, not 'remove the extremum row'; with duplicate values a value-filter would over-remove). No trimmed-mean op.

1epzpacytv3wx2i6.note: yes/no 'are values 2010-2013 rising': filter 2010-2013 -> monotonicRun(increasing) to detect the rising run.

1hv85ef35tbvldiq.note: count years with revenue<2 billion: filter(<2) -> count.

1hm06wtar7gh92c8.note: population over 65 in 2020 = share(2020) * 100000: retrieveValue(2020) -> scale(100000). (100000 is given in the question, not external.)

1hp11sl0mo4ohtpo.note: greatest increase vs previous year + its magnitude: lagDiff -> findExtremum max (year-over-year, x already chronological).

1it2ia9kmdihxan8.note: count years with <50 incidents: filter(<50) -> count.

1lg9qn6shf8ifsdq.note: yes/no: sum(until Jan2013, first 5 periods)*3 < sum(from Feb2013, last 5). include-filter each 5-period block (labels are period strings) -> sum; scale(3); compareBool(<).

1lf1h5jf9ymeid5q.note: count years with >3M increase vs previous: lagDiff -> filter(>3) -> count.

1jgaguuh4rqlk7sq.note: diff(sum 2008-2013, sum 2014-2019) i.e. first six vs last six years.

1j86ensex8nyvdyk.note: '3-year range with highest increase' approximated by the 3-year window with the max summed total (rollingWindow window=3) then max. (Grammar has no 3-span delta; rolling-sum window is the closest range measure.)

1gdzafocxmz7rswi.note: count years with traffic < (1st-largest minus 2nd-largest): findExtremum max rank1,rank2 -> diff -> filter(<,ref) -> count.

1g17ep9vho38jvcz.note: count continents whose share > (max-min share). range -> filter(>,ref) -> count.

1hlsoeyqlr1r1n41.note: count regions with revenue < average-of-revenue-excluding-the-highest. findExtremum max -> filter(<max) drops the top region -> average of the rest -> filter(< that avg) within the rest -> count. (Assumes a unique max.)

1g95in84ywix6pcf.note: 2nd biggest among creators starting with 'a' (Amixem, Andy). include-filter the two a-creators -> sort(desc) -> nth(2). (Only Amixem/Andy start with 'a' in x_vals.)
